mapper.select: SELECT t2.sample_name , t3.id as itemId, t3.times, t3.unit_price, t3.check_item_name, t3.state FROM test_entrusted_sample_details_rel AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_sample AS t2 ON t1.sample_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel AS t3 ON t3.sample_id = t2.id WHERE t1.entrustment_id =#{entrustmentId} and t3.task_id = #{taskId}
SELECT id, pid, NAME, CODE FROM test_team WHERE del_flag = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC

SELECT * FROM taskQueryShow
and task_id in
#{id}
ORDER BY task_code DESC

SELECT t1.task_source taskSource, SUM( t1.actual_price ) actualPrice, SUM( t1.receivedPrice ) receivedPrice FROM ( SELECT t1.id, t1.acceptance_date, t1.task_source, t1.actual_price, IFNULL( t2.price, 0 ) receivedPrice FROM test_entrusted_info t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_payment_record_info t2 ON t1.id = t2.entrustment_id WHERE t1.state != 144 ) t1
and t1.task_source = #{taskSource}
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY t1.task_source ORDER BY actualPrice DESC

SELECT IFNULL( t1.taskSource,t2.taskSource) taskSource, IFNULL( t1.actualPrice,0) actualPrice, IFNULL( t1.receivedPrice,0) receivedPrice, IFNULL( t2.actualReportPrice, 0 ) actualReportPrice, IFNULL( t2.systemReportPrice, 0 ) systemReportPrice FROM ( SELECT t1.task_source taskSource, SUM( t1.actual_price ) actualPrice, SUM( t1.receivedPrice ) receivedPrice FROM ( SELECT t1.id, t1.acceptance_date, t1.task_source, ROUND(IFNULL(t1.actual_price,0),2) actual_price, ROUND(IFNULL( t2.price, 0 ),2) receivedPrice FROM test_entrusted_info t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_payment_record_info t2 ON t1.id = t2.entrustment_id WHERE t1.state != 144 ) t1
and t1.task_source = #{taskSource}
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY t1.task_source ) t1 ${flag} JOIN ( SELECT t1.task_source taskSource, SUM( ROUND( t1.actual_price, 2 ) ) actualReportPrice, SUM( ROUND( t1.system_price, 2 ) ) systemReportPrice FROM test_entrusted_info t1 LEFT JOIN test_report_record t2 ON t1.id = t2.entrustment_id WHERE t2.issuer_time IS NOT NULL
and t1.task_source = #{taskSource}
and DATE_FORMAT(t2.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t2.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY t1.task_source ) t2 ON t1.taskSource = t2.taskSource ORDER BY t1.actualPrice DESC

SELECT count(*) FROM ( SELECT t1.task_source taskSource, SUM( t1.actual_price ) actualPrice, SUM( t1.receivedPrice ) receivedPrice FROM ( SELECT t1.id, t1.acceptance_date, t1.task_source, t1.actual_price, IFNULL( t2.price, 0 ) receivedPrice FROM test_entrusted_info t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_payment_record_info t2 ON t1.id = t2.entrustment_id WHERE t1.state != 144 ) t1
and t1.task_source = #{taskSource}
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.acceptance_date, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY t1.task_source ) t1

SELECT count(*) FROM ( SELECT t1.task_source taskSource, SUM( t1.actual_price ) actualReportPrice, SUM( t1.system_price ) systemReportPrice FROM test_entrusted_info t1 LEFT JOIN test_report_record t2 ON t1.id = t2.entrustment_id WHERE t2.issuer_time IS NOT NULL
and t1.task_source = #{taskSource}
and DATE_FORMAT(t2.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t2.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY t1.task_source ) t2

SELECT t3.NAME teamName, t3.CODE teamCode, SUM( IFNULL( t2.discount, 1 ) * IFNULL( t4.unit_price, 0 ) ) taskPrice FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_team t3 ON t1.dept_id = t3.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t4 ON t1.id = t4.task_id
and t3.NAME = #{taskSource}
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.review_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.review_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY t3.NAME, t3.CODE ORDER BY taskPrice DESC

SELECT t1.teamName, t1.teamCode, t1.taskPrice, t2.reportPrice FROM ( SELECT t3.NAME teamName, t3.CODE teamCode, SUM( IFNULL( t2.discount, 1 ) * IFNULL( t4.unit_price, 0 ) ) taskPrice FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_team t3 ON t1.dept_id = t3.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t4 ON t1.id = t4.task_id
t1.review_time is not null
and t3.NAME = #{taskSource}
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.review_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.review_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY t3.NAME, t3.CODE ) t1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t3.NAME teamName, SUM( IFNULL( t2.discount, 1 ) * IFNULL( t5.unit_price, 0 ) ) reportPrice FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_team t3 ON t1.dept_id = t3.id LEFT JOIN test_report_record t4 ON t2.id = t4.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t5 ON t1.id = t5.task_id where t4.issuer_time is not null
and t3.NAME = #{taskSource}
and DATE_FORMAT(t4.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t4.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY t3.NAME, t3.CODE ) t2 ON t1.teamName = t2.teamName ORDER BY t1.taskPrice DESC

SELECT t1.teamId, t1.teamName, t1.teamCode, t1.taskPrice, t2.actualReportPrice FROM
( SELECT t2.id teamId, t2.NAME teamName, t2.code teamCode, t1.`VALUE` taskPrice FROM ( SELECT t2.pid, SUM( t1.task_price ) VALUE
FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_team t2 ON t1.dept_id = t2.id WHERE t1.review_time IS NOT NULL
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.review_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.review_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and t1.dept_id in
#{id}
GROUP BY t2.pid ) t1 LEFT JOIN test_team t2 ON t1.pid = t2.id ) t1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t2.id teamId, t2.`name` teamName, t2.code teamCode, t1.VALUE actualReportPrice FROM ( SELECT t3.pid, SUM( t2.task_price ) VALUE FROM (select * from test_report_record where issuer_time is not null) t1 LEFT JOIN test_task t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_team t3 ON t2.dept_id = t3.id WHERE pid IS NOT NULL
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and t2.dept_id in
#{id}
GROUP BY t3.pid ) t1 LEFT JOIN test_team t2 ON t1.pid = t2.id ) t2 ON t1.teamId = t2.teamId

SELECT t3.id teamId, t3.name teamName, IFNULL(t3.code,'——') teamCode, IFNULL(t1.taskPrice,0) taskPrice, IFNULL(t2.actualReportPrice,0) actualReportPrice FROM (select t1.id, t1.name, t1.code from test_team t1 where t1.pid = 0) t3 left join ( SELECT t2.id teamId, t2.NAME teamName, t2.code teamCode, t1.`VALUE` taskPrice FROM ( SELECT t2.pid, SUM( t1.task_price ) VALUE
FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_team t2 ON t1.dept_id = t2.id WHERE t1.review_time IS NOT NULL
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.review_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.review_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and t1.dept_id in
#{id}
GROUP BY t2.pid ) t1 LEFT JOIN test_team t2 ON t1.pid = t2.id ) t1 on t3.id = t1.teamId LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t2.id teamId, t2.`name` teamName, t2.code teamCode, t1.VALUE actualReportPrice FROM ( SELECT t3.pid, SUM( t2.task_price ) VALUE FROM (select * from test_report_record where issuer_time is not null) t1 LEFT JOIN test_task t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_team t3 ON t2.dept_id = t3.id WHERE pid IS NOT NULL
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and t2.dept_id in
#{id}
GROUP BY t3.pid ) t1 LEFT JOIN test_team t2 ON t1.pid = t2.id ) t2 ON t3.id = t2.teamId

SELECT t3.id teamId, t3.name teamName, IFNULL(t3.code,'——') teamCode, IFNULL(t1.taskPrice,0) taskPrice, IFNULL(t2.actualReportPrice,0) actualReportPrice FROM (select t1.id, t1.name, t1.code from test_team t1 where t1.pid = 0) t3 left join ( SELECT t2.id teamId, t2.NAME teamName, t2.code teamCode, t1.`VALUE` taskPrice FROM ( SELECT t2.pid, SUM( t1.task_price ) VALUE
FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, NAME,id AS pid,CODE FROM test_team UNION ALL SELECT old_team_id AS id,old_team_name AS NAME,new_team_id AS pid,old_team_code AS CODE FROM test_team_rel) t2 ON t1.dept_id = t2.id WHERE t1.review_time IS NOT NULL
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.review_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.review_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and t1.dept_id in
#{id}
GROUP BY t2.pid ) t1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, NAME,id AS pid,CODE FROM test_team UNION ALL SELECT old_team_id AS id,old_team_name AS NAME,new_team_id AS pid,old_team_code AS CODE FROM test_team_rel) t2 ON t1.pid = t2.id ) t1 on t3.id = t1.teamId LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t2.id teamId, t2.`name` teamName, t2.code teamCode, t1.VALUE actualReportPrice FROM ( SELECT t2.pid, SUM( t1.sum_task_price ) VALUE FROM (SELECT t1.*, IFNULL( t2.discount, 1 ) * IFNULL( t3.unit_price, 0 ) * IFNULL( t3.times, 0 ) sum_task_price FROM test_task_statistics t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_statistics t3 ON t2.id = t3.entrust_id AND t1.id = t3.task_id AND DATE_FORMAT(t1.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(t3.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d')) t1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, NAME,id AS pid,CODE FROM test_team UNION ALL SELECT old_team_id AS id,old_team_name AS NAME,new_team_id AS pid,old_team_code AS CODE FROM test_team_rel) t2 ON t1.dept_id = t2.id WHERE t2.pid IS NOT NULL
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and t1.dept_id in
#{id}
GROUP BY t2.pid ) t1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, NAME,id AS pid,CODE FROM test_team UNION ALL SELECT old_team_id AS id,old_team_name AS NAME,new_team_id AS pid,old_team_code AS CODE FROM test_team_rel) t2 ON t1.pid = t2.id ) t2 ON t3.id = t2.teamId

SELECT t1.teamId, t1.teamName, t1.teamCode, t1.taskPrice, t2.actualReportPrice FROM ( SELECT t2.id teamId, t2.NAME teamName, t2.code teamCode, t1.`VALUE` taskPrice FROM ( SELECT t2.id, SUM( t1.task_price ) VALUE
FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, NAME,id AS pid,CODE FROM test_team UNION ALL SELECT old_team_id AS id,old_team_name AS NAME,new_team_id AS pid,old_team_code AS CODE FROM test_team_rel) t2 ON t1.dept_id = t2.id WHERE t1.review_time IS NOT NULL
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.review_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.review_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and t1.dept_id in
#{id}
GROUP BY t2.id ) t1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, NAME,id AS pid,CODE FROM test_team UNION ALL SELECT old_team_id AS id,old_team_name AS NAME,new_team_id AS pid,old_team_code AS CODE FROM test_team_rel) t2 ON t1.id = t2.id ) t1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t2.id teamId, t2.`name` teamName, t2.code teamCode, t1.VALUE actualReportPrice FROM ( SELECT t3.id, SUM( t2.task_price ) VALUE FROM (select * from test_report_record where issuer_time is not null) t1 LEFT JOIN test_task t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, NAME,id AS pid,CODE FROM test_team UNION ALL SELECT old_team_id AS id,old_team_name AS NAME,new_team_id AS pid,old_team_code AS CODE FROM test_team_rel) t3 ON t2.dept_id = t3.id WHERE pid IS NOT NULL
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and t2.dept_id in
#{id}
GROUP BY t3.id ) t1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, NAME,id AS pid,CODE FROM test_team UNION ALL SELECT old_team_id AS id,old_team_name AS NAME,new_team_id AS pid,old_team_code AS CODE FROM test_team_rel) t2 ON t1.id = t2.id ) t2 ON t1.teamId = t2.teamId

SELECT t2.id teamId, t2.`name` teamName, t1.VALUE actualReportPrice FROM ( SELECT t3.pid, SUM( t2.task_price ) VALUE FROM test_report_record t1 LEFT JOIN test_task t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_team t3 ON t2.dept_id = t3.id where pid IS NOT NULL
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and t2.dept_id in
#{id}
GROUP BY t3.pid ) t1 LEFT JOIN test_team t2 ON t1.pid = t2.id

SELECT t2.id teamId, t2.NAME teamName, t1.`VALUE` taskPrice FROM ( SELECT t2.pid, SUM( t1.task_price ) VALUE FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_team t2 ON t1.dept_id = t2.id WHERE t1.review_time IS NOT NULL
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.review_time, '%Y-%m-%d')>= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(t1.review_time, '%Y-%m-%d')<= DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and t1.dept_id in
#{id}
GROUP BY t2.pid ) t1 LEFT JOIN test_team t2 ON t1.pid = t2.id
SELECT @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS value, t1.* FROM ( SELECT @rownum := 0 ) r, ( SELECT DISTINCT task_source label FROM test_entrusted_info ) t1
SELECT discount FROM test_entrusted_info WHERE id = #{entrustmentId}

SELECT t3.id teamId, t3.NAME teamName, t1.task_code as taskCode, t2.discount, t2.entrustment_no, SUM( IFNULL( t5.unit_price, 0 ) ) * 1.00 actualPrice, SUM( IFNULL( t2.discount, 1 ) * IFNULL( t5.unit_price, 0 ) * IFNULL( t5.times, 0 ) ) systemPrice FROM test_task_statistics t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT id, NAME, id AS pid, CODE FROM test_team UNION ALL SELECT old_team_id AS id, old_team_name AS NAME, new_team_id AS pid, old_team_code AS CODE FROM test_team_rel ) t3 ON t1.dept_id = t3.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_statistics t5 ON t1.id = t5.task_id AND DATE_FORMAT( t1.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ) = DATE_FORMAT( t5.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ) WHERE t3.pid = #{teamId} AND DATE_FORMAT( t1.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ) >= DATE_FORMAT( #{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d' ) AND DATE_FORMAT( t1.issuer_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ) <= DATE_FORMAT( #{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d' ) GROUP BY t1.id ORDER BY t2.entrustment_no desc
